categories.name: Android Development
categories.description: Build modern, production-ready Android apps with Kotlin.

courses.title: Kotlin Fundamentals
courses.subtitle: Everything you need to start writing Kotlin

instructor.name: Aarav Sharma
instructor.title: Senior Android Engineer
instructor.bio: 10+ years building Android apps used by millions of people.

courses.description: Start from zero and learn Kotlin's syntax, null safety, collections, and functions. By the end you'll be comfortable reading and writing idiomatic Kotlin.

lessons.title: Welcome & Setup
lessons.content: Set up Android Studio and run your first Kotlin file.

lessons.title: Variables & Null Safety
lessons.content: Learn val vs var, nullable types, and the safe-call operator.

lessons.title: Functions & Lambdas
lessons.content: Write functions, use default arguments, and pass lambdas around.

courses.title: Jetpack Compose Essentials
courses.subtitle: Build UIs the modern, declarative way

instructor.name: Meera Nair
instructor.title: Android UI Specialist
instructor.bio: Conference speaker and author focused on Android UI and Compose.

courses.description: Learn composable functions, state management, layouts, and lists to build beautiful, reactive Android interfaces with Jetpack Compose.

lessons.title: Your First Composable
lessons.content: Create and preview a simple composable function.

lessons.title: State & Recomposition
lessons.content: Understand remember, mutableStateOf, and how recomposition works.

lessons.title: Lists with LazyColumn
lessons.content: Render scrollable lists efficiently using LazyColumn.

categories.name: Backend & APIs
categories.description: Design and build the services that power your apps.

courses.title: Designing REST APIs
courses.subtitle: Principles of clean, predictable APIs

instructor.name: Rahul Verma
instructor.title: Backend Architect
instructor.bio: Designs large-scale APIs and mentors backend teams.

courses.description: Learn resource modeling, status codes, pagination, versioning, and error handling to design REST APIs that clients love to consume.

lessons.title: What Makes an API RESTful
lessons.content: Resources, verbs, and statelessness explained simply.

lessons.title: Status Codes & Errors
lessons.content: Use the right HTTP codes and design clear error bodies.

lessons.title: Pagination & Filtering
lessons.content: Handle large collections with paging and query params.

courses.title: Node.js from Scratch
courses.subtitle: Build your first backend service

instructor.name: Sara Khan
instructor.title: Full-stack Developer
instructor.bio: Builds full-stack products and loves teaching beginners.

courses.description: Go from nothing to a working REST service using Node.js and Express, including routing, middleware, and connecting to a database.

lessons.title: Setting Up Node
lessons.content: Install Node and run your first script.

lessons.title: Your First Express Server
lessons.content: Create routes and return JSON responses.

lessons.title: Middleware Basics
lessons.content: Add logging and request parsing with middleware.

categories.name: Product & UI Design
categories.description: Design interfaces that people enjoy using.

courses.title: UI/UX Foundations
courses.subtitle: Core principles of great product design

instructor.name: Diya Patel
instructor.title: Product Designer
instructor.bio: Designs delightful mobile experiences at scale.

courses.description: Understand hierarchy, spacing, color, and typography, and learn a simple process for designing screens that are clear and usable.

lessons.title: Visual Hierarchy
lessons.content: Guide the eye with size, weight, and spacing.

lessons.title: Color & Contrast
lessons.content: Pick accessible color palettes that actually work.

lessons.title: Typography Basics
lessons.content: Choose and pair fonts for readable interfaces.

courses.title: Figma for Developers
courses.subtitle: Turn designs into code, faster

instructor.name: Arjun Mehta
instructor.title: Design Engineer
instructor.bio: Bridges design and engineering with design systems.

courses.description: Learn to read Figma files, inspect specs, export assets, and translate components into clean front-end code.

lessons.title: Navigating Figma
lessons.content: Frames, layers, and the inspect panel.

lessons.title: Reading Specs
lessons.content: Get exact sizes, colors, and spacing for handoff.

lessons.title: Exporting Assets
lessons.content: Export images and icons at the right resolutions.
